channel.title: Amrit Ghimire - Tech
channel.description: Blog posts by Amrit Ghimire - Tech

item.title: BizNava Support
item.description: Welcome to BizNava support! We're here to help you get the most out of your business management app. Learn how to manage bookings, clients, services, and use all the powerful features BizNava has to offer.

item.title: Biblioform Support
item.description: Welcome to Biblioform! This guide will help you get the most out of your book collection management app. Learn how to organize your library, track reading progress, set goals, and use all the powerful features Biblioform has to offer.

item.title: Budgeting features in Finrup
item.description: Finrup's budgeting features are designed to help you manage your finances more effectively. This article will show you how to use Finrup's budgeting features to manage your finances.

item.title: Power user's guide to automation with Finrup
item.description: Finrup's advanced automation features allow you to create custom workflows and automate your financial life. This article will show you how to use Finrup's advanced automation features to automate your financial life.

item.title: How to Track Expenses with Finrup: Complete Guide
item.description: Managing your personal finances doesn't have to be complicated. With Finrup, tracking expenses becomes effortless, whether you're on your iPhone, Mac, or Vision Pro. This comprehensive guide will walk you through everything you need to know about expense tracking with Finrup.

item.title: 20 Best Budgeting Tips for 2025
item.description: Budgeting doesn't have to be restrictive or complicated. With the right strategies and tools like Finrup, you can create a sustainable budget that helps you achieve your financial goals while still enjoying life. Here are the best budgeting tips for 2025, backed by proven strategies and modern technology.

item.title: Multi-Currency Money Management Guide with Finrup
item.description: In our increasingly globalized world, managing money across multiple currencies is no longer just for international businesses—it's a reality for digital nomads, expats, frequent travelers, online sellers, and remote workers. Finrup's multi-currency features make managing international finances simple.

item.title: Finrup vs Mint: Which Budget App is Better? 2025 Comparison
item.description: Choosing the right budgeting app can transform your financial life. Mint has been a household name in personal finance for years, while Finrup offers a fresh, privacy-focused alternative optimized for Apple devices. This comprehensive comparison will help you decide which app best suits your needs.

item.title: Finrup vs YNAB: Budget App Comparison 2025
item.description: YNAB (You Need A Budget) and Finrup both take personal finance seriously, but they approach budgeting from different philosophical and technical perspectives. This detailed comparison will help you understand which app aligns better with your financial goals and lifestyle.

item.title: Using Siri Shortcuts for Expense Tracking with Finrup
item.description: Voice-activated expense tracking transforms how you manage money. Instead of pulling out your phone, opening an app, and filling in fields, you simply say 'Hey Siri, log my coffee purchase' and you're done. Finrup's deep Siri integration makes this seamless.

item.title: Jira Terminal
item.description: As my first opensource and first rust project, I created an opensource command line interface for day to day activity of JIRA, I have a habit of automating most of my day to day task to terminal command. I have created a command line application that can be used to interact with Jira from terminal.

item.title: विकिपिडिया
item.description: हामी आफूलाई जानकारी चाहिएका थुप्रै विषय गुगल सर्च गर्दा सुरुमै विकिपिडियाको लिंक भेट्छौँ । व्यवस्थित गरिएर त्यसबारे जानकारी राखिने हुँदा त्यसमै छिर्न रुचाउँछौँ हामी । तर, नेपालबारे के त्यसै गरी विकिपिडियामा पृष्ठहरू भेटाउँछौँ त ?
